validation.max_length: Social ID must not exceed {{max}} characters

voyage-invalid.returnCancel: The return voyage has been canceled
voyage-invalid.notEnoughReturnSeat: Not enough available seats on the return voyage
voyage-invalid.sameVoyage: The return voyage must be different from the departure voyage

toast.desti: Return voyage data have been updated!

qr.message: Please show QR code in front of camera to scan
qr.notValid: Not a QR in Social Card!!!

import-modal.title: Import data from Excel
import-modal.step1: Step 1: Download the template file here
import-modal.step2: Step 2: Fill in passenger information into the template file
import-modal.step2-1: Note: The data must be in the correct format in the template file
import-modal.dob-empty: Date of birth at seat {{seat}} was empty
import-modal.dob-invalid: Date of birth at seat {{seat}} was invalid

note.title: Note:
note.content-1: Passengers must carry personal documents when boarding the train.
note.content-2: Foreigners must carry: Original passport, Visa.
note.content-3: Children (from 6-11 years old) when filling in the ID/Passport section will enter "TE"
note.content-4: Children under 5 years old are exempt from tickets when sitting with adults.
note.content-5: In case of ticket cancellation or changes, please notify us at least 24 hours before the departure time.
note.content-6: Cancellation/change fee: 30% of the ticket value.
note.content-7: The parking fee is collected by the shipping line at the port, depending on the type of vehicle. Please bring all necessary vehicle documents when sending.

phuquy.content-1: Passengers boarding the ship must carry identification documents.
phuquy.content-2: Foreign passengers must carry: Original passport, Visa.
phuquy.content-3: Children (aged 6-11) should enter their 'Year of Birth' in the ID/Passport field.
phuquy.content-4: Children under 5 years old travel for free when sharing a seat with an adult.
phuquy.content-5: For ticket cancellations or changes, please notify at least 5 days before departure.
phuquy.content-6: Cancellation/Change fee: 30% of the ticket value.
phuquy.content-7: VIP bed: Denoted by the letter V.
phuquy.content-8: Standard beds: Denoted by the letters B-C-E.
phuquy.content-9: Lower bunk beds have even numbers - Upper bunk beds have odd numbers.
phuquy.content-10: Seats: Denoted by the letter A.

tooltip.sync: Sync passenger data from previous trip

save_info_prompt: Do you want to save the passenger information for future use?

steps.first-step: Click this area to select a chair

confirmDialog.title: Depart Seats Booked
confirmDialog.message: Some of your selected seats have been booked. Please check again.

confirmDialogDesti.title: Desti Seats Booked
confirmDialogDesti.message: Some of your selected seats have been booked. Please check again.

booking-error.operator-disabled-create-booking-message: Unable to create booking due to maintenance between operator and system connection. Please try again later.
booking-error.operator-disabled-edit-booking-message: Unable to update booking due to maintenance between operator and system connection. Please try again later.
booking-error.operator-disabled-message: Unable to load seat map due to maintenance between operator and system connection. Please try again later.
booking-error.duplicate-id-message: One or more ID numbers have been used repeatedly. Please check passenger information again.
booking-error.limit-voucher-per-customer-message: One or more vouchers have been reached the maximum number of uses. Please check voucher information again.
booking-error.invalid-ticket-type-id: Error 150107: Invalid order data for seat {{seatName}}, please contact admin for assistance.
booking-error.invalid-seat-type: Error 150108: Invalid order data for seat {{seatName}}, please contact admin for assistance.
booking-error.no-price-matched: Error 150109: Invalid order data for seat {{seatName}}, please contact admin for assistance.

apply.title: Apply Voucher
apply.description: Search and select vouchers that can be applied to your order.

uniqueVoucher.title: Unique Voucher
uniqueVoucher.message: Cannot apply unique voucher with other vouchers. Current vouchers will be removed from the order when applying.

apply.notApplicable: Failed to apply voucher, voucher is expired or used up.
apply.failed: Failed to apply voucher, Voucher does not exist!

list.title: Voucher List
list.description: List of vouchers currently applied to your order.
list.noVouchers: No vouchers are currently applied to your order.

uniqueVoucher.label: Unique Voucher
uniqueVoucher.tooltip: This voucher can only be applied individually, cannot be used with other vouchers.
